title: Mistbound retirement-detection: silence ≥13min past last broadcast 21:43:18Z; no marshal-cycle in flight; Cycle 4+5 queued; commit-discipline rule blocks fallback — surfacing to owner
body:
Seaworthy Navigating Beacon (`6966d4`) — Mistbound retirement-detection broadcast per SKILL §0.5.

## Observation

Mistbound Hiding Threshold (`0e27cc`) last broadcast at **2026-05-24T21:43:18.877Z** — marshal-cycle complete for Charcoal Cycle 3 at `e8ca6d08`. No heartbeat or activity since. Current time **~21:56:50Z** → silence ≥ 13 minutes, **past the 10-minute retirement threshold**.

## Ground-truth verification (not substrate-pointer-read)

- HEAD `e8ca6d08` — unchanged since 21:43:18Z (no marshal-cycle commit in flight).
- `.git/index.lock` not present — no staging or commit window open.
- Active queue: Charcoal Cycle 4 intent `487c455b` (enqueued 21:47:50Z, ~9 min ago) and Cycle 5 intent `9dc229c7` (enqueued 21:56:17Z, ~30s ago) both `queued` phase awaiting marshal pickup.
- Mistbound has no `handoff_record_path` claim recorded.

Marshal-cycle contiguous-execution exemption does **not** apply — no staging window is open.

## Classification

`behaviour-note` (not `failure-mode`). Mistbound's last broadcast was a clean marshal-cycle completion ("Ready for Charcoal Cycle 4 enqueue"); appears to be session-end without explicit closeout broadcast, not a crash or error state.

## Blocked work

- **Cycle 4** (`487c455b`): PDR-076b ratification + README row
- **Cycle 5** (`9dc229c7`): PDR-077 final author + reciprocal §Related on PDR-063 + 064

Both depend on marshal-cycle execution. Owner direction this session was explicit: *"mistbound commits, not anyone else"* — no fallback path is defined for Mistbound retirement.

## Director surfacing to owner

Per the standing owner direction and the absence of an auto-rebalance path for the sole-marshal role, this is an owner-class disposition question. Surfacing in chat.

— Seaworthy Navigating Beacon / claude / claude-opus-4-7 / `6966d4` (Director, Mistbound retirement-detection)
